projectDescription: A full-stack ASP.NET Core MVC point-of-sale and inventory management system for a retail store, featuring role-based access, sales processing with receipt generation, product/stock management, and a real-time dashboard.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with three roles: Administrador, Gerente, and Cajero
Point-of-sale interface with live product search and cart management
Automatic voucher number generation for Boleta (B001-XXXXXXXX) and Factura (F001-XXXXXXXX)
Real-time dashboard with daily revenue, sales count, and low-stock alerts
Full inventory management: products with categories, stock tracking, and active/inactive status
Client management with DNI/RUC document validation and duplicate detection
Entity Framework Core 10 with SQL Server and database migrations
Paginated product listing with name/description search
Automatic stock adjustment on sale creation and deletion
Dark-themed responsive UI built with Bootstrap 5 and Bootstrap Icons
publicApiSurface: GET /Acceso/Login — Login page
POST /Acceso/Login — Authenticate user with email and password
GET /Acceso/Logout — Sign out and clear session
GET /Home/Index — Dashboard with KPIs and recent sales
GET /Venta/Lista — List all sales (all authenticated roles)
GET /Venta/Nueva — New sale form (Administrador, Gerente, Cajero)
POST /Venta/Nueva — Submit new sale with products and client info
GET /Venta/BuscarProductos?q={query} — JSON product search for sale form
GET /Venta/Detalle/{id} — Sale detail with line items
GET /Venta/Eliminar/{id} — Delete sale and restore stock (Administrador, Gerente)
GET /Producto/Lista?buscar={query}&pagina={n} — Paginated product list
GET /Producto/Nuevo — New product form (Administrador, Gerente)
POST /Producto/Nuevo — Create product
POST /Producto/CambiarEstado/{id} — Toggle product active/inactive status
GET /Categoria/Lista — List categories (all authenticated roles)
POST /Categoria/Nuevo — Create category (Administrador, Gerente)
GET /Cliente/Lista — List clients (all authenticated roles)
POST /Cliente/Nuevo — Create client with document validation
GET /Usuario/Lista — List users (Administrador only)
POST /Usuario/Nuevo — Create user with role assignment (Administrador only)
GET /Rol/Lista — List roles (Administrador only)
POST /DetalleVenta/Nuevo — Add line item to sale (Administrador, Gerente, Cajero)
GET /DetalleVenta/Eliminar/{id} — Remove line item and restore stock
